title: K-200 GCS Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 GCS Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-411-B. Revision: B. Type: design-note. Author: Jordan Kim. Created: 2024-11-25. Last modified: 2025-02-18. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the GCS subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1063, P-1133.
